docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF NON SERVICE: SUMMONS & COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF APR-04-2008 CONTINUED TO JUN-20-2008 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT. 212. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DECLARATION OF NON-SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR AUG-06-2008 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S). THE JUN-20-2008 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
PRE-TRIAL CALENDAR SWEEP, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR OF AUG-06-2008, OFF CALENDAR, DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION FILED (SWEEP)

COMMON COUNTS/OPEN BOOK ACCOUNT/COLLECTIONS, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK AS TO DEFENDANT ESLEY, KELLY J SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR APR-04-2008 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUN-02-2008 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         MAR-20-2008
